creator: florian@fsrv.xyz
text:
Hello there,

seems that nobody would care about my reports. Sad :(
Due to thanos 0.11.0 and my update to 0.18.0 is not up to date any more, I made a diff for updating to the latest version 0.24.0 .

Please contact me, if anything else is needed to update this port.

Kind regards
Florian
